tweets.text:
266 DEXs built on Orderly's orderbook.

None of them had to bootstrap liquidity.

They just plugged in.

You can short gold on-chain.

No broker. No KYC. No custody risk.

XAU perps on Orderly. Same gold. No middleman.

$186 billion in volume.

Not a CEX. Not a single app.

266 DEXs. 18 chains. One orderbook.

Most protocols: "Here are our docs."

Orderly: "Here's an MCP server. Ask your AI to build the thing."

github.com/OrderlyNetwork/orderly-mcp

What can you build with Orderly's MCP?

- Perp DEX with live orderbook
- Portfolio tracker with PnL history
- Liquidation alert bot
- Funding rate arbitrage scanner
- Copy trading dashboard

All from a single AI prompt.

The Orderly MCP server has 7 tools.

Search docs. Get SDK patterns. Lookup contracts. Explain workflows. Query the API. Pull indexer rankings. Generate component guides.

Your AI assistant now has the blueprints.

We gave Claude access to our MCP server.

It built a working trading dashboard in one prompt.

Live orderbook. Position management. Real-time PnL.

This is what AI-native infra looks like.

Point Cursor at the Orderly MCP server.

Type: "Build me a perp DEX with live orderbook and position management."

It knows every SDK hook, every contract, every API endpoint.

You ship in hours, not months.
